name: The Chewy Oatmeal Cookie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups Firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease baking sheet with Butter Flavor Crisco.
3. In a large bowl, combine the Butter Flavor Crisco, light brown sugar, Egg, Milk and Vanilla. Mix until well blended.
4. Gradually add oats, flour, Baking soda, Salt and Cinnamon to the creamed mixture. Mix at low speed just until combined.
5. Stir in raisins and nuts.
6. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto the baking sheet, about 2 inches apart.
7. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly browned.
8. Allow cooling for 2 minutes on the baking sheet before removing to a wire rack on the countertop.
